title: HDFC Bank shares fall 5% as part-time chair of India’s largest private bank resigns over 'ethics'
summary_full: Interim part‑time chairman, Keki Mistry, said that Atanu Chakraborty, had not provided the board with any evidence or details of the alleged unethical practices.
summary_public: Interim part‑time chairman, Keki Mistry, said that Atanu Chakraborty, had not provided the board with any evidence or details of the alleged unethical practices.
